# hetzner-robot_wol (Resource)

Sends a Wake-on-LAN packet to a server. Action-style resource: it sends the packet on create and is a no-op on destroy. Change `triggers` to send another packet.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Send a Wake-on-LAN packet to a server.
resource "hetzner-robot_wol" "node" {
  server_number = 123456
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `server_number` (Number) Number of the server to wake

### Optional

- `triggers` (Map of String) Arbitrary key/value pairs that force a new WOL packet when changed.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
